ab: Nga’ay ho! O maan ko cakayen iso?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: Nga’ay ho! O maan ko cakayen iso?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: Micakay kako to kup-pu^, ira itini haw?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: Ira to. Pinaen iso ko picakay?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?
A: Do you sell betel nut?
B: No, we don't sell betel nut.
A: I want to buy rice.
B: How many packs do you want to buy?
A: Give me three packs.
A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: Awaay to. Maemin to cakayen no tao.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: Micakay kako to simal tosa^ kofoc.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.
B: We only have one bottle left.
A: Go buy me eggs.
B: How many catties do you want to buy?

ab: Pina^ a dadoy ko picakay iso?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?
B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: Micakay kako to kenaw tosa^ falod.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: To:lo^ to falod ko ’osaw, emin han miala^ ari.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!
A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: Cecay tafo^ tosa^ li’an ko pida^.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: Tosa^ polo’ ira ko cecay pida^ mapo:long. Tosa^ polo’ hato ko sa’osi^.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.
B: Thank you.

ab: Siwa^ polo’ ira ko lima^ kina pida^.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: Micakay haca^ kako, sapilepon to cecay li’an no pida^.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: Lima^ li’an ira ko mo^tep pida^ a mapo:long.
en: A:All $510.
B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: Caay ka nga’ay! Ka^me:day to koni.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.
A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: Tolo^ polo’ pida^ kina piyang. Mangalay ho^ to roma^ haw?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
